Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants two POWL models written in Python using pm4py based on the hiring process description

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 with potential unfairness ReceiveApplication Data completeness loop loop between DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment xor branch standard CulturalFitCheck vs CommunityAffiliationCheck then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Skill assessment threshold may be modeled with rejection but to keep the focus on the bias branch it is simpler to omit that extra choice

Text: FinalDecision could be a single activity or could be expanded into Hire and Reject alternatives

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The main asked structure is after skill assessment an xor branch with one branch for standard cultural fit and the other for community affiliation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 code structure uses transitions ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision with a loop for data completeness and xor for the cultural stage

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In model 1 the xor branch is placed after skill assessment and before managerial review which matches the description of where subtle bias appears

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness keeps ReceiveApplication the data completeness loop SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview and FinalDecision in sequence and removes the community based xor branch

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Both models share the same loop for completeness and sequential ordering while differing only in the handling of the cultural fit and affiliation check
